languages.text: "Я спасу Нунциуса. Пятьдесят лет поисков, расчетов и экспериментов не могут пойти прахом — это слишком долгий путь, чтобы сдаться в самом конце. Это долг, который я должен отдать коллеге. Нет — человечеству. Если я обуздаю смерть здесь и сейчас, значит я проложу путь новой эпохе для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Методы не имеют значения{/d}. Разве кто-то помнит сотни неудачных попыток и жертв, которые приносятся в ходе поиска решения задачи, если это решение в итоге оказывается единственно верным?" {n}Эоганн говорит пылко, не глядя на Нунциуса.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я спасу Нунциуса. Пятьдесят лет поисков, расчетов и экспериментов не могут пойти прахом — это слишком долгий путь, чтобы сдаться в самом конце. Это долг, который я должен отдать коллеге. Нет — человечеству. Если я обуздаю смерть здесь и сейчас, значит я проложу путь новой эпохе для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}. Методы не имеют значения. Разве кто-то помнит сотни неудачных попыток и жертв, которые приносятся в ходе поиска решения задачи, если это решение в итоге оказывается единственно верным?" {n}Эоганн говорит пылко, не глядя на Нунциуса.{/n}
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я спасу Нунциуса. Пятьдесят лет поисков, расчетов и экспериментов не могут пойти прахом — это слишком долгий путь, чтобы сдаться в самом конце. "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the Imperium. The methods do not matter. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: «Salvaré a Nuncius. Estos cincuenta años de investigación, cálculos y experimentos no habrán sido en vano; he llegado demasiado lejos para claudicar al final. Se lo debo a mi colega. No, a toda la humanidad. Si logro domeñar la muerte aquí y ahora, habré despejado el camino a una nueva era para el {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Poco importan mis métodos{/d}. ¿Quién se acuerda de los centenares de intentos fallidos y sacrificios realizados en pos de una solución a un problema, si tal solución termina siendo la única correcta?», {n}pregunta Eogunn con vehemencia, pero sin mirar a Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Salvaré a Nuncius. Estos cincuenta años de investigación, cálculos y experimentos no habrán sido en vano; he llegado demasiado lejos para claudicar al final. Se lo debo a mi colega. No, a toda la humanidad. Si logro domeñar la muerte aquí y ahora, habré despejado el camino a una nueva era para el {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Poco importan mis métodos{/d}. ¿Quién se acuerda de los centenares de intentos fallidos y sacrificios realizados en pos de una solución a un problema, si tal solución termina siendo la única correcta?», {n}pregunta Eogunn con vehemencia, pero sin mirar a Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: “我会拯救努恩修斯。五十年的搜寻、计算、实验，不能白费。我付出了这么多，岂能在最后关头放弃。这是我欠他的……不，是欠全人类的。如果我能在此时此地征服死亡，那我就为{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}开辟了一个新纪元。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}手段不重要{/d}。只要能够找到唯一正确的答案，那谁还会在乎之前成百上千次的失败和牺牲？”{n}伊奥贡越说越激动，但始终没看努恩修斯一眼。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我会拯救努恩修斯。五十年的搜寻、计算、实验，不能白费。我付出了这么多，岂能在最后关头放弃。这是我欠他的……不，是欠全人类的。如果我能在此时此地征服死亡，那我就为{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}开辟了一个新纪元。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}手段不重要{/d}。只要能够找到唯一正确的答案，那谁还会在乎之前成百上千次的失败和牺牲？”{n}伊奥贡越说越激动，但始终没看努恩修斯一眼。{/n}

languages.text: « Je vais sauver Nuncius. Je refuse de gâcher ces cinquante années d'études, de calculs et d'expériences. Je suis allé trop loin pour baisser les bras alors que le bout du chemin est en vue. Je le dois à mon collègue. Non, à toute l'humanité. Si je parviens à triompher de la mort, j'ouvrirai la voie à un nouvel âge pour l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Les méthodes sont sans importance{/d}. Qui se souvient des centaines de sacrifices et de tentatives infructueuses que l'on effectue en essayant de résoudre un problème, s'ils aboutissent à la seule solution possible ? » {n}demande Eogunn sur un ton frénétique, sans regarder Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

Si je parviens à triompher de la mort, j'ouvrirai la voie à un nouvel âge pour l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Les méthodes sont sans importance{/d}. Qui se souvient des centaines de sacrifices et de tentatives infructueuses que l'on effectue en essayant de résoudre un problème, s'ils aboutissent à la seule solution possible ? » {n}demande Eogunn sur un ton frénétique, sans regarder Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: "Nuncius'u kurtaracağım. Elli yıllık arayış, hesaplama ve deney boşuna olamaz. Şu noktada pes etmek için çok uzun bir yol kat ettim. Bunu meslektaşıma borçluyum. Hayır, İnsanlığa borçluyum. Eğer ölümü tam burada ve şimdi alt edersem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'u{/g} yeni bir çağa sokacağım. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Yöntemlerin bir önemi yok{/d}. Soruna çözüm ararken yapılan yüzlerce başarısız girişimi ve fedakârlığı kim hatırlar ki? Yeter ki çözüm, tek doğru çözüm olsun." {n}Hararetle konuşan Eogunn, Nuncius'a bakamıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

Hayır, İnsanlığa borçluyum. Eğer ölümü tam burada ve şimdi alt edersem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'u{/g} yeni bir çağa sokacağım. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Yöntemlerin bir önemi yok{/d}. Soruna çözüm ararken yapılan yüzlerce başarısız girişimi ve fedakârlığı kim hatırlar ki? Yeter ki çözüm, tek doğru çözüm olsun." {n}Hararetle konuşan Eogunn, Nuncius'a bakamıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich werde Nuncius retten. Fünfzig Jahre Suche, Berechnungen und Experimente dürfen nicht umsonst gewesen sein ... ich bin zu weit gereist, um kurz vor dem Ziel aufzugeben. Das schulde ich meinem Kollegen. Nein, der Menschheit. Wenn ich den Tod hier und jetzt besiege, ebne ich dem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} den Weg in ein neues Zeitalter. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Die Methoden spielen keine Rolle{/d}. Erinnert sich jemand an die zahllosen gescheiterten Versuche und Opfer auf der Suche nach der Lösung eines Problems, wenn sich besagte Lösung als die einzig richtige erweist?" {n}Während seiner Ansprache würdigt Eogunn Nuncius keines Blickes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

Das schulde ich meinem Kollegen. Nein, der Menschheit. Wenn ich den Tod hier und jetzt besiege, ebne ich dem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} den Weg in ein neues Zeitalter. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Die Methoden spielen keine Rolle{/d}. Erinnert sich jemand an die zahllosen gescheiterten Versuche und Opfer auf der Suche nach der Lösung eines Problems, wenn sich besagte Lösung als die einzig richtige erweist?" {n}Während seiner Ansprache würdigt Eogunn Nuncius keines Blickes.{/n}

languages.text: 「私はヌンキウスを救います。五十年にわたる探索、計算、実験が、無駄であったはずがない――この期に及んで諦めるには、私はあまりに遠くまで来てしまった。これは、我が同僚に対して負った負債です。いや、人類に対する負債だ。もし私が今ここで死を克服するなら、私は{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}の新たな時代への道を切り拓くことになる。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}手段など問題ではない{/d}。ある問題の解決策を探し求める過程で生じる、幾百もの失敗と犠牲を、いったい誰が覚えているでしょうか――その解決策が、結局のところ唯一の正解であったなら？」{n}エオガンは、ヌンキウスを見ようともせず、激した調子で問う。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私はヌンキウスを救います。五十年にわたる探索、計算、実験が、無駄であったはずがない――この期に及んで諦めるには、私はあまりに遠くまで来てしまった。これは、我が同僚に対して負った負債です。いや、人類に対する負債だ。もし私が今ここで死を克服するなら、私は{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}の新たな時代への道を切り拓くことになる。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}手段など問題ではない{/d}。ある問題の解決策を探し求める過程で生じる、幾百もの失敗と犠牲を、いったい誰が覚えているでしょうか――その解決策が、結局のところ唯一の正解であったなら？」{n}エオガンは、ヌンキウスを見ようともせず、激した調子で問う。{/n}
